emails.subject: EOL Deal
emails.body: EOL Deal Errol- Deal Number QW8614.3 was put in manually as a trade with Dynegy Canada. However, I looked in Enron Online and it says that the counterparty is Dynegy Marketing and Trade. Thanks.
